label: TOC Buffer Management

links.label: TOC Settings
links.description: Global TOC configuration — zone thresholds, DBM parameters, DAF, email alerts

links.label: Stock Settings
links.description: Verify auto_indent is OFF (disabled on install). Default reorder must stay disabled.

links.label: Item (Configure Buffers)
links.description: Open any Item → scroll to TOC Buffer Management → add warehouse buffer rules (ADU, RLT, VF)

links.label: Warehouse
links.description: Warehouse master — buffer rules reference warehouses defined here

links.label: Production Priority Board
links.description: THE daily report — all items sorted by BP% (F3). Run VFFS in this order. Has Generate MR + DAF buttons.

links.label: Procurement Action List
links.description: RM/PM focused — shows PO quantities, freight recommendation, supplier action by zone.

links.label: Buffer Status Report
links.description: Historical buffer trends from TOC Buffer Log — BP% over time with charts.

links.label: DBM Analysis Report
links.description: Dynamic Buffer Management — TMR/TMG trigger history, buffer size changes.

links.label: Material Request
links.description: All Material Requests — filter by custom_toc_recorded_by=By System to see TOC-created MRs.

links.label: TOC Buffer Log
links.description: Daily buffer snapshots — used by DBM engine for TMR/TMG analysis.

links.label: Bin (Live Stock)
links.description: Real-time stock data — actual_qty, reserved_qty, ordered_qty. TOC reads from here.

links.label: Work Order
links.description: Open Work Orders = WIP (Work In Progress) component of F2: IP calculation.

links.label: TOC User Guide (Full)
links.description: Complete guide with all formulas, glossary, flows, and use cases

links.label: TOC Settings
links.description: Configure zone thresholds, DBM parameters, alerts

links.label: Production Priority Board
links.description: Daily priority report sorted by BP%

links.label: Buffer Status Report
links.description: Historical buffer trend analysis

links.label: Scheduled Job Log
links.description: Check if the 7:00 AM daily run executed. Look for chaizup_toc.tasks entries.

links.label: Error Log
links.description: Check for TOC-related Python errors. Filter by 'TOC' in method field.

links.label: Email Queue
links.description: Check if Red zone email alerts were sent. Filter by 'TOC' in subject.

links.label: Role Permission Manager
links.description: Configure TOC Manager and TOC User role permissions.

name: TOC Buffer Management
title: TOC Buffer Management
